channel.title: Cyberattaques | Casualtek
channel.description: Flux RSS de suivi, en Français, des cyberattaques rapportées dans la presse internationale. Maintenu par Valéry Rieß-Marchive (LeMagIT).

item.title: United Arab Emirates (ARE) autour du 22 février 2026.
item.description: Les Émirats arabes unis ont stoppé une attaque de ransomware qui visait les infrastructures numériques du pays, l'attaque a été qualifiée de terroriste par le Conseil de cybersécurité du pays. L'attaque a impliqué des tentatives d'infiltration de réseaux, de déploiement de ransomware et de campagnes de phishing ciblant les plateformes nationales. Les attaques ont également impliqué l'exploitation de technologies d'intelligence artificielle pour développer des outils offensifs sophistiqués.

item.title: City of Carthage, Texas (USA) autour du 22 janvier 2025.
item.description: The City of Carthage, Texas suffered a security incident involving unauthorized access to their network, potentially exposing personal information. The incident occurred on or about December 17, 2024, and was discovered on January 22, 2026. A cyberattack was claimed by Rhysida on January 28.

item.title: The Texas Access to Justice Foundation (USA) autour du 09 mai 2025.
item.description: The Texas Access to Justice Foundation suffered a data breach between May 6, 2025, and May 9, 2025, resulting in unauthorized access to certain files containing personal information. The breach was discovered on May 9, 2025, and affected approximately one Maine resident. The compromised information included names and Social Security numbers.

item.title: ICM Properties, Inc. (USA) autour du 10 décembre 2025.
item.description: ICM Properties, Inc. suffered a data security incident that may have resulted in unauthorized access to some individuals' personal information. The incident occurred between December 9, 2025, and December 10, 2025. ICM Properties has taken steps to enhance the security of its systems and data to reduce the risk of similar incidents.

item.title: Fort Scott Community College (USA) autour du 23 novembre 2025.
item.description: Fort Scott Community College suffered a data security incident on November 23, 2025, where an unauthorized party accessed their network and potentially accessed certain files. The incident may have compromised personal information including Social Security Number, Financial Account Information, and Name. The college has taken steps to secure and remediate the impacted systems and is offering free credit monitoring and identity theft protection services to affected individuals.

item.title: Academic Urology & Urogynecology of Arizona (USA) autour du 22 mai 2025.
item.description: Academic Urology & Urogynecology of Arizona experienced a cybersecurity incident that potentially involved unauthorized access to their network, resulting in the potential exposure of personal and protected health information. A cyberattack was claimed by INCransom on June 17.

item.title: Gehry Partners, LLP (USA) autour du 08 juin 2025.
item.description: Gehry Partners, LLP suffered a data breach between June 6-June 9, 2025, where an unauthorized actor accessed and acquired certain data from their network. The breach was discovered on June 8, 2025, and the affected personal information was confirmed on January 8, 2026. The organization is offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity protection services to affected individuals.

item.title: West Florida Bank Corporation (USA) autour du 07 mai 2025.
item.description: West Florida Bank Corporation suffered a data breach due to a social engineering scheme, which occurred on April 15, 2025. The breach was discovered on May 7, 2025. A cyberattack was claimed by Akira on May 27.

item.title: Greater Pittsburgh Orthopedic Associates Inc. (USA) autour du 10 août 2025.
item.description: Greater Pittsburgh Orthopedic Associates Inc. experienced a data security incident involving unauthorized access to their computer network, potentially affecting personal or health information. The incident occurred on August 10, 2025, and the organization has taken measures to secure their environment and prevent similar incidents. A cyberattack was claimed by Ransomhouse on August 20.

item.title: The Center for Advanced Eye Care (USA) autour du 16 décembre 2025.
item.description: The Center for Advanced Eye Care suffered a data security incident where unauthorized access to protected health information occurred. The incident was discovered on December 16, 2025, and the affected individuals were notified on February 19, 2026. The breach may have resulted in the unauthorized access to personal information.

item.title: CSA Tax & Advisory (USA) autour du 02 décembre 2025.
item.description: H&N Tax, Inc. dba CSA Tax experienced a network disruption on December 2, 2025, which led to unauthorized access to certain information stored on their network. The potentially affected data may have included first and last names, in combination with Social Security numbers. A cyberattack was claimed by Lynx on December 26.

item.title: Beacon Pointe Advisors, LLC (USA) autour du 01 février 2026.
item.description: Beacon Pointe Advisors, LLC suffered a data breach due to unauthorized access to their IT network, resulting in potential exposure of client information. The breach occurred between January 30, 2026, and February 1, 2026. The company has taken steps to secure the network and is offering complimentary identity monitoring services to affected clients.

item.title: Saint Mary’s Home of Erie (USA) autour du 27 août 2025.
item.description: Saint Mary’s Home of Erie experienced a data breach where files and folders stored on certain databases may have been accessible to others outside of their organization between August 26, 2025, and August 28, 2025. A cyberattack was claimed by Worldleaks on October 3.

item.title: Alpine Lumber Company (USA) autour du 22 décembre 2025.
item.description: Alpine Lumber Company suffered a data security incident involving ransomware, resulting in unauthorized access to employee and dependent information, including names, addresses, Social Security numbers, and health insurance information.

item.title: TAKBroadband, LLC (USA) autour du 11 août 2025.
item.description: TAKBroadband, LLC experienced a security incident where an unauthorized third party accessed certain systems and acquired files containing personal information between August 2, 2025, and August 12, 2025. The affected files contained names and other personal information. The incident was discovered on August 11, 2025.

item.title: Svealandstrafiken (SWE) autour du 23 février 2026.
item.description: Svealandstrafiken a subi une attaque informatique majeure, causant de grandes perturbations dans ses activités. L'attaque a eu lieu lundi et a affecté les opérations de l'entreprise. Les détails de l'attaque ne sont pas encore connus.

item.title: Cocoa (USA) autour du 16 février 2026.
item.description: La ville de Cocoa, en Floride, a subi une attaque de ransomware qui a perturbé certains systèmes informatiques, limitant ainsi certains services. Les autorités ont déclaré l'état d'urgence et travaillent avec des partenaires pour rétablir les systèmes. Les opérations d'urgence et de dispatch restent opérationnelles.

item.title: Hazeldenes (AUS) autour du 20 février 2026.
item.description: Une attaque cybernétique a touché l'usine de traitement de viande de poulet Hazeldenes, provoquant une pénurie de poulet dans les pubs et les boucheries de l'État. L'entreprise travaille avec des enquêteurs en cybersécurité pour identifier la cause de l'attaque. Les entreprises cherchent désormais d'autres fournisseurs de viande de poulet pour éviter que les clients ne soient affectés.

item.title: The Grand Hotel Taipei (TWN) autour du 17 février 2026.
item.description: Le Grand Hotel Taipei a confirmé que ses systèmes de sécurité ont été piratés, les mesures de réponse aux incidents de cybersécurité ont été activées et les autorités enquêtent sur l'affaire. L'hôtel a publié un avis de fraude pour avertir les clients de faire preuve de vigilance. Les opérations de l'hôtel ne sont pas affectées par cet incident.

item.title: Universidade Federal de Sergipe (BRA) autour du 20 février 2026.
item.description: La Universidade Federal de Sergipe a subi un attaque cibernétique visant les ordinateurs équipés de Windows, les équipes techniques ont pris des mesures de sécurité et analysent l'incident. Les systèmes SIG et d'autres services fonctionnent normalement, mais les utilisateurs sont invités à garder les ordinateurs Windows éteints. L'université assure que les données et services sont protégés et que des mesures sont prises pour prévenir de futurs incidents.
